expression.label: text7
expression.exp: "sMD = 15 && hinge = midpoint > parabola (M diagram) = parabola (ideal thrust line)"

expression.label: text11
expression.exp:
"POINT LOAD
∑ F_{V} = 0, ∑ F_{H} = 0, ∑ M = 0
∑ M_{1} = 0 P * h - F_{2V} * l = 0 F_{2V} = (P * h) / l F_{2V} = " + ((F * h / l)) + " kN
∑ M_{2} = 0 P * h + F_{1V} * l = 0 F_{1V} = (- P * h) / l F_{1V} = - " + ((F * h / l)) + " kN
∑ M_{3} = 0 (left part) F_{1V} * l_1 - F_{1H} * h = 0 F_{1H} = (F_{1V} * l_1) / h F_{1H} = - P h / l l_1 / h = - " + (((F * h / l) * l_1 / h)) + " kN
∑ M_{3} = 0 (right part) - F_{2V} * l_2 + F_{2H} * h = 0 F_{2H} = (F_{2V} * l_2) / h F_{2H} = P h / l l_2 / h = " + (((F * h / l) * l_2 / h)) + " kN
graphically: F_{1V} = - " + ((Length[w_4] * scaleForceDiagram)) + " F_{2V} = " + ((Length[v_4] * scaleForceDiagram)) + " F_{1H} = " + ((Length[z_4] * scaleForceDiagram)) + " F_{2H} = " + ((Length[u_4] * scaleForceDiagram)) + "
M_{4} = F_{1H} * h = " + (((b_9 * scaleForceDiagram) * h)) + "kNm (graphically) M_{4} = F_{1H} * h = P h / l l_1 / h * h = " + ((((F * h / l) * l_1 / h) * h)) + " kNm (analytically)
M_{5} = F_{2H} * h = " + (((s_8 * scaleForceDiagram) * h)) + "kNm (graphically) M_{5} = F_{2H} * h = P h / l l_2 / h *h = " + ((((F * h / l) * l_2 / h) * h)) + " kNm (analytically)"

expression.label: text3
expression.exp:
"UNIFORMLY DISTRIBUTED LOAD
F_{1V} = F_{2V} = q * l / 2 = " + ((q * l / 2)) + " kN F_{1V} = F_{2V} graphically = " + ((a_3 * scaleForceDiagram)) + " kN
F_{1H} analytically F_{1H} = F_{2H} = q * l² / 8 * h = " + (((q * l) * l / ((8 * h)))) + " kN > not dynamic, i.e. doesn't take into account hinge position!!!
> calculating the moment M around the hinge based on the hinge position ∑M_{3} = 0 - R1 * l_1/2 + F_{1V} * l_1 - F_{1H} * h = 0 - (q * l_1) * l_1 / 2 + (q * l)/2 * l_1 - F_{1H} * h = 0 F_{1H} = (- (q * l_1) * l_1 / 2 + (q * l)/2 * l_1)) / h F_{1H} = " + (((((-q) * l_1) * l_1 / 2) + ((q * l / 2) * l_1)) / h) + " kN
F_{2H} = (- (q * l_2) * l_2 / 2 + (q * l)/2 * l_2)) / h F_{2H} = " + (((((-q) * l_2) * l_2 / 2) + ((q * l / 2) * l_2)) / h) + " kN
F_{1H} = F_{2H} graphically F_{1H} = F_{2H} = " + ((s_2 * scaleForceDiagram)) + " kN
Moments in the frame corners: M_{4} = M_{5} = F_{1H} * h = F_{2H} * h (graphically) M_{4} = M_{5} = " + (((s_2 * scaleForceDiagram) * h)) + " kNm
M_{4} = - R1 * l_1/2 + F_{1V} * l_1 = F_{1H} * h (analytically): M_{4} = - (q * l_1) * l_1 / 2 + (q * l)/2 * l_1 = (-q l_1 l_1 / 2 + q l / 2 l_1) / h * h M_{4} = " + ((-(((q * l_1) * l_1 / 2))) + (((q * l)) / 2 * l_1)) + " kNm = " + ((((((-q) * l_1) * l_1 / 2) + ((q * l / 2) * l_1)) / h * h)) + " kNm
M_{Feld}: M_{Feld} = ql²/8 = " + ((((q * l) * l)) / 8) + " (analytically) M_{Feld} = " + ((j_4 * sMD)) + " (graphically)"

expression.label: text37
expression.exp:
"SUPERPOSITION (graphically) F_{2H} = " + ((Length[w_1 + u_4] * scaleForceDiagram)) + "kN F_{2V} = " + ((Length[z_1 + v_4] * scaleForceDiagram)) + "kN F_{1V} = " + ((Length[u_2 + w_4] * scaleForceDiagram)) + "kN F_{1H} = " + ((Length[v_2 + z_4] * scaleForceDiagram)) + "kN
M_{4} = " + (((h * Length[u_7]) * scaleForceDiagram)) + " kNm M_{5} =" + (((h * Length[v_6]) * scaleForceDiagram)) + " kNm"
